evals.prompt: Implement these stories: GC-DOC-US031 GC-DOC-US019 GC-DOC-US020
evals.expected_output: Parallel autonomous implementation of all 3 stories using Claude Code teams, each in an isolated worktree with its own branch and PR
expectations: The skill validates each story code exists in SmartSuite before launching
The skill reports the list of stories that will be implemented with their titles
The skill creates a team with TeamCreate
The skill creates one task per story with TaskCreate
The skill pre-assigns task owners before spawning workers
The skill spawns one team member per story using deep-executor subagent type
All team members are spawned in a single message (parallel, not sequential)
Each worker's preamble lists all 10 mandatory phases
Each worker's preamble tells them to invoke /omc-rails-autopilot with the story code
Each worker's preamble allows skill invocation and sub-agent spawning
The skill monitors progress via TaskList and inbound messages
The skill reports a progress summary table showing story, status, branch, and PR columns
Each completed story results in a separate git branch and PR
The skill performs graceful team shutdown when all stories complete
The skill offers to run a post-batch quality pass (/dhh-review and /bali-view-audit) on completed PRs
SmartSuite story statuses are updated during execution

evals.expected_output: Fetches 3 stories from SmartSuite backlog and launches a team with one member per story
expectations: The skill queries SmartSuite for the top 3 backlog stories scoped to the current project
The skill reports which stories were found with their codes and titles before launching
The skill creates a team and spawns 3 members (one per story)
Each member runs the full omc-rails-autopilot workflow independently
The skill does not launch members for stories that are not in backlog status

evals.prompt: Implement these stories and let me review them tomorrow: GC-DOC-US031 GC-DOC-US019 GC-DOC-US020
evals.expected_output: Launches a team with 3 members for overnight autonomous execution
expectations: The skill creates a team and spawns all 3 members in parallel
Each member creates its own worktree via autopilot Phase 1 at .worktrees/feature/STORY-ID
The skill monitors progress and reports as members complete
The batch continues running without requiring user interaction
Each story produces an independent PR that can be reviewed separately
